inputs.label: Purchase Price (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Initial acquisition cost of the vehicle, including taxes and fees.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial acquisition cost of the vehicle, including taxes and fees.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi ve harçlar dahil aracın ilk edinim maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anschaffungskosten des Fahrzeugs inklusive Steuern und Gebühren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût d'acquisition initial du véhicule, taxes et frais inclus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste inicial de adquisición del vehículo, incluyendo impuestos y tasas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة الاقتناء الأولية للمركبة، بما في ذلك الضرائب والرسوم.

inputs.label: Residual Value (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated market value of the vehicle at the end of the holding period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated market value of the vehicle at the end of the holding period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aracın elde tutma süresi sonunda tahmini piyasa değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Marktwert des Fahrzeugs am Ende der Haltedauer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur marchande estimée du véhicule à la fin de la période de détention.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de mercado estimado del vehículo al final del período de tenencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة السوقية المقدرة للمركبة في نهاية فترة الاحتفاظ.

inputs.label: Holding Period (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of years the vehicle will be owned and used.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected number of years the vehicle will be owned and used.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aracın sahip olunup kullanılması beklenen yıl sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Anzahl der Jahre, in denen das Fahrzeug besessen und genutzt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années prévu pendant lequel le véhicule sera possédé et utilisé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número esperado de años que el vehículo será poseído y utilizado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد السنوات المتوقعة لامتلاك واستخدام المركبة.

inputs.label: Annual Mileage (miles)
inputs.businessContext: Average miles driven per year, directly impacts wear and depreciation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average miles driven per year, directly impacts wear and depreciation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yılda sürülen ortalama mil; aşınma ve amortismanı doğrudan etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlich pro Jahr gefahrene Meilen, wirkt sich direkt auf Verschleiß und Wertminderung aus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Miles moyens parcourus par an, impacte directement l'usure et la dépréciation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Millas promedio recorridas por año, impacta directamente el desgaste y la depreciación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط الأميال المقطوعة سنويًا، يؤثر مباشرة على التآكل والاستهلاك.

inputs.label: Depreciation Method
inputs.businessContext: Accounting method used to allocate depreciation expense over the holding period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Accounting method used to allocate depreciation expense over the holding period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Amortisman giderini elde tutma süresi boyunca dağıtmak için kullanılan muhasebe yöntemi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Buchhalterische Methode zur Verteilung der Abschreibung über die Haltedauer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Méthode comptable utilisée pour répartir la charge d'amortissement sur la période de détention.
businessContext_i18n.es: Método contable utilizado para asignar el gasto de depreciación durante el período de tenencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطريقة المحاسبية المستخدمة لتوزيع مصروف الاستهلاك على فترة الاحتفاظ.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Average yearly expenditure on repairs, tires, and routine servicing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average yearly expenditure on repairs, tires, and routine servicing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Onarım, lastik ve rutin bakım için ortalama yıllık harcama.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche jährliche Ausgaben für Reparaturen, Reifen und Routinewartung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépense annuelle moyenne en réparations, pneus et entretien courant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gasto medio anual en reparaciones, neumáticos y servicio rutinario.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط الإنفاق السنوي على الإصلاحات والإطارات والصيانة الدورية.

inputs.label: Fuel Efficiency (MPG)
inputs.businessContext: Miles per gallon, used to estimate fuel cost and total cost of ownership.

businessContext_i18n.en: Miles per gallon, used to estimate fuel cost and total cost of ownership.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Galon başına mil; yakıt maliyeti ve toplam sahip olma maliyetini tahmin etmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Meilen pro Gallone, zur Schätzung der Kraftstoffkosten und Gesamtbetriebskosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Miles par gallon, utilisé pour estimer le coût du carburant et le coût total de possession.
businessContext_i18n.es: Millas por galón, utilizado para estimar el coste de combustible y el coste total de propiedad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ميل لكل غالون، يُستخدم لتقدير تكلفة الوقود والتكلفة الإجمالية للملكية.

inputs.label: Fuel Price per Gallon (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Current or projected average fuel price for the vehicle's fuel type.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current or projected average fuel price for the vehicle's fuel type.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aracın yakıt türü için cari veya tahmini ortalama yakıt fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller oder prognostizierter durchschnittlicher Kraftstoffpreis für den Kraftstofftyp des Fahrzeugs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix moyen actuel ou projeté du carburant pour le type de carburant du véhicule.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio medio actual o proyectado del combustible para el tipo de vehículo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط سعر الوقود الحالي أو المتوقع لنوع وقود المركبة.

rules.message: Residual value must be less than purchase price.
Holding period must be at least 1 year.
Fuel efficiency must be greater than 0.
Discount rate must be between 0% and 30%.

thresholds.message: Annual depreciation rate exceeds 25% — consider shorter holding period or different vehicle type.
Total cost of ownership exceeds 150% of purchase price — review operating expenses.
Residual value is less than 20% of purchase price — high depreciation risk.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
